name: Chili Con Carne Winchester
recipeIngredient: 1 can VEG-ALL Mixed Vegetables, with liquid (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 3-quart pot. Add onion and green pepper and cook until soft.
2. Add ground beef, garlic, stewed tomatoes, and kidney beans. Bring to boil; cover, reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Stir in VEG-ALL and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
